conclusion: ยังสรุปไม่ได้
purpose: Convert the H-A2.38 metadata-only Databento cost estimate into a tightly scoped one-day paid download decision for independent validation data, without changing the locked H-A2 signal or making an edge claim.

selected_batch.role: one-day high-VIX independent validation sample before any larger pack

windows: 10:00 ET through 15:45 ET option exit/check windows

pre_download_requirements: Run python scripts/audit_paid_costs.py after this decision artifact is created and before any download.
Proceed only if the latest paid-cost audit status is pass.
Proceed only if projected_used_after_download_usd remains below the active stop_threshold_usd.
Use only the 15 requests already costed in reports/data_cost/h_a2_independent_validation_paid_cost_estimate.json.
Reuse any local cache if present and record cache reuse in the download result.
allowed_actions: Download only the approved Databento requests for sample_cost_probe_high_vix_one_day on 2025-04-08 after paid-cost audit passes.
Write a download result JSON/Markdown report under reports/data_cost.
Rerun paid-cost audit after download and treat the downloaded estimate as committed cost until provider actual usage is supplied.
After download, create a separate import/normalization/diagnostic step before any H-A2 validation claim.
forbidden_actions: Do not download any date other than 2025-04-08 under this decision.
Do not estimate or download the broad 2025 calendar under this decision.
Do not download high_vix_validation_pack, low_normal_vix_control_pack, or post_stress_normalization_control_pack under this decision.
Do not introduce a new paid provider.
Do not add a new OOS-selected filter.
Do not reuse original 09:35 PnL as delayed-entry PnL.
Do not run exact replay directly from this decision.
Do not approve paper trading, operational validation, real-money trading, or E2 evidence from this decision.
completion_criteria: The decision cites the H-A2.37 preregistration and H-A2.38 live metadata estimate.
The decision selects only sample_cost_probe_high_vix_one_day for 2025-04-08.
The decision preserves the 09:35-only signal and threshold 0.001.
The decision caps scope to the 15 metadata-costed requests.
The decision confirms projected usage remains below $125.
tier_blockers: No paid download has been performed by this artifact
No independent validation PnL days added yet
No import or normalization result yet
